# Scriptora Validation Suite — Report Comparativo

- 10 capitoli Romance
- 10 capitoli Thriller

## Confronto pipeline
| Pipeline | Descrizione |
|---|---|
| **Baseline (pre A+B+C+D)** | Humanize only — nessun pre-delivery gate |
